data.body: Investigation complete: The error-sweep.sh in the current DSO plugin repo source has zero .tickets/ references — the bug is not reproducible from current code. Most likely source is a stale plugin cache in the host project (~/.claude/plugins/) running an older version that predates v2→v3 migration. Fix requires the host project to sync/update its plugin cache — not a DSO repo code change. Leaving ticket open for tracking; no code fix possible in this repo.
